case_title: CHRISTINE WELDON VS. JI QING OUYANG ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100106035)

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELDON, CHRISTINE AS TO DEFENDANT OUYANG, JI QING DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-10-2020 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-06-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-18-2020
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-10-2020 CONTINUED TO JUL-22-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-01-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-22-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-01-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
